name: obsidian
description: Obsidian vault management — Dataview, Templater, workflows, MCP, plugins
notes: Some docs are authored (vault-organization, mocs-guide, zettelkasten, para-method, mcp-servers, plugin-ecosystem). Dataview and Templater docs scraped via Firecrawl. tasks-plugin.md, sync-backup.md, publishing.md, graph-analysis.md, daily-notes.md have no working upstream source: publish.obsidian.md/tasks and all help.obsidian.md pages are JS-rendered app shells with no markdown/llms.txt mirror (confirmed 2026-07-06) — content validation always fails against the raw HTML. Docs are frozen hand-authored/fallback content; no source entry until Obsidian ships a plaintext mirror.
